def test_good_read_only_annotation(tmp_path):
    # CLI_EVIDENCE_ALLOW_READ_ONLY: 상태 조회만 하므로 evidence assertion 불필요
    result = subprocess.run(["python", "pipeline.py", "done", "--phase", "dev"], capture_output=True)
    assert result.returncode == 0
